Awning Stays, Hinges & Restrictors

This page is for awning stay replacement, window hinge service, restrictors and in-frame security stays across Wellington. If the sash will not stay open, has been bent in bad weather, is dropping out of alignment or needs a cleaner security-stay setup, this is the right page.

Common issues

Bent awning stays, seized hinges, loose restrictors, sash movement, poor closing pressure and windows that no longer hold position safely.

What we do

We replace failed stays, service hinges, fit restrictors and security stays and then re-align the sash so the window seals and operates properly.

What happens next

A photo of the stay, hinge or bent sash helps. We can usually tell quickly whether it is a straight replacement, a hinge service or a wider alignment issue.

Searches we commonly help with

This page supports searches like window stay replacement, awning stay replacement, window hinge repair, awning window hinge repair, security stays Wellington, hidden security stays and window restrictor fitting. Many people search for hinges when the actual failed part is the awning stay, so this page covers both.

Security stays Window repairs Handles, locks and restrictors

Get a quote for stays, hinges or restrictors

Best for bent awning stays, failed hinges, in-frame security stays, restrictors and windows that no longer hold position.

Where we work

We replace stays and service hinges across Central Wellington, Porirua, Lower Hutt, Upper Hutt, Petone and Kapiti.

Helpful guides

  • Awning stay replacement after a storm
  • Do your window stays need replacing?
  • In-frame security stays vs face-mounted stays

Stays and hinges FAQs

Do you replace bent awning stays after storms?

Yes. We replace bent awning stays, re-align the sash and make sure the window opens, holds position and seals properly again.

Are awning stays the same as window hinges?

Many people call them window hinges, but awning stays are the support arms that control the opening. We service both stays and hinges as part of the same repair.

Can you fit hidden in-frame security stays?

Yes. Where the profile allows, we fit in-frame security stays for a cleaner look and less visible fixing points than face-mounted hardware.
